normalized_candidate.description: Verify that the minimal viable scope for the first tiny live autonomy pilot is fully documented, including: (1) defined inputs and expected outputs, (2) explicit success and failure criteria, (3) stakeholder sign-off. This must be resolved before live execution proceeds.
